name: aiwatcher-mcp
description: AI news ingestion, distillation, and alert system. Polls RSS/Atom feeds and Alpha Signal emails, scores items with Claude, fires TTS wake-ups for critical events.

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.description: Anthropic API key for Claude distillation and digest generation

env.name: ALERT_THRESHOLD
env.description: Urgency score (0-10) above which TTS wake-up fires. Default: 8.5

env.name: ROBOFANG_ENABLED
env.description: Send critical alerts to robofang Council bridge. Default: true

env.name: EMAIL_ENABLED
env.description: Send daily digest email to recipients. Default: false

tools.name: poll_feeds
tools.description: Poll all enabled RSS/Atom feeds for new items

tools.name: distill_pending
tools.description: Score unprocessed items with Claude (relevance + urgency 0-10)

tools.name: check_alerts
tools.description: Fire robofang + TTS for items above alert threshold

tools.name: generate_digest
tools.description: Build HTML+text digest from recent scored items

tools.name: send_digest_now
tools.description: Force-send digest email to configured recipients

tools.name: get_top_items
tools.description: Top items sorted by urgency for a given time window

tools.name: get_feeds_list
tools.description: List all configured feeds with status

tools.name: add_feed
tools.description: Add a new RSS/Atom source by URL
